'''Striker''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that attempted to reinforce the [[Elliirad Platform]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
